positive_prompt:
pixel art, 32x32 style, top-down view, stone-age primitive, 16-color earthy palette, crisp pixels, no outline blur
flat stone slab on log supports, scattered flint tools and hide scraps, primitive crafting surface, no metal

notes: Tier-1 crafting. Flint, bone, wood only.
